text_parts.content: 'McDonald's To Spend $100M To Move Past E. Coli Outbreak; Company Is Boosting Advertising And Supporting Franchisees; More Than 100 In 14 States Were Sickened By The Outbreak' - Bloomberg News

https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-11-15/mcdonald-s-to-spend-100-million-to-move-past-e-coli-outbreakMcDonald's Corp. is spending $100 million in an effort to revive sales and support franchisees after a severe

https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-11-15/mcdonald-s-to-spend-100-million-to-move-past-e-coli-outbreak McDonald's Corp. is spending $100 million in an effort to revive sales and support franchisees after a severe E. Coli outbreak spooked diners away.
